content.text: Let me fetch the hooks documentation directly.

input.prompt: List all valid hook event names that can be configured in settings.json

content.content:
# Valid Hook Event Names

Based on the documentation, here are all valid hook event names that can be configured in settings.json:

## Session-Level Events
- `SessionStart` - When a session begins or resumes
- `SessionEnd` - When a session terminates

## Per-Turn Events
- `UserPromptSubmit` - When user submits a prompt, before Claude processes it
- `Stop` - When Claude finishes responding
- `StopFailure` - When the turn ends due to an API error

## Tool Execution Events
- `PreToolUse` - Before a tool call executes
- `PostToolUse` - After a tool call succeeds
- `PostToolUseFailure` - After a tool call fails
- `PermissionRequest` - When a permission dialog appears
- `PermissionDenied` - When a tool call is denied by auto mode classifier

## Agent & Task Events
- `SubagentStart` - When a subagent is spawned
- `SubagentStop` - When a subagent finishes
- `TaskCreated` - When a task is being created
- `TaskCompleted` - When a task is marked as completed
- `TeammateIdle` - When an agent team teammate is about to go idle

## File & Configuration Events
- `FileChanged` - When a watched file changes on disk
- `CwdChanged` - When the working directory changes
- `ConfigChange` - When a configuration file changes during a session
- `InstructionsLoaded` - When CLAUDE.md or `.claude/rules/*.md` file is loaded

## Context & Notification Events
- `Notification` - When Claude Code sends a notification
- `PreCompact` - Before context compaction
- `PostCompact` - After context compaction completes

## MCP & Elicitation Events
- `Elicitation` - When an MCP server requests user input
- `ElicitationResult` - After user responds to MCP elicitation

## Worktree Events
- `WorktreeCreate` - When a worktree is being created
- `WorktreeRemove` - When a worktree is being removed

These events can be configured in any of these locations:
- `~/.claude/settings.json` (user-wide)
- `.claude/settings.json` (project-wide)
- `.claude/settings.local.json` (project-local)
- Plugin `hooks/hooks.json`
- Skill or agent frontmatter
